name: lore
description: Persistent cross-project memory for Codex — rules, decisions, and context that follow you.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-project memory — rules, decisions, and context that persist across sessions.
interface.longDescription: Lore gives your coding agent a persistent second brain. Promote domain rules, architecture facts, past decisions, coding preferences, and glossary terms into shared knowledge — then Lore delivers them automatically through four layers: SessionStart injection at session open, adaptive whispers before each prompt, MCP recall tools for deep on-demand search, and pre-turn advisory hints. Silent when nothing is relevant. Always under your control.
defaultPrompt: What domain rules apply to this codebase?
Recall architecture decisions relevant to this task
Search Lore for conventions I should follow here
